properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v5

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: There's within my heart a melody Jesus whispers sweet and low, Fear not, I am with thee, peace, be still In all of life's ebb and flow

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Jesus, Jesus, Jesus! Sweetest Name I know, Fills my every longing, Keeps me singing as I go

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Feasting on the riches of His grace, Resting'neath His shelt'ring arm, Always looking on His smiling face, That is why I shout and sing

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Soon He's coming back to welcome me, Far beyond the starry sky I shall wing my flight to worlds unknown, I shall reign with Him on high

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Jesus, Jesus, Jesus! Sweetest Name I know, Fills my every longing, Keeps me singing as I go Keeps me singing as I go Keeps me singing as I go
